description: Positive cases are requests to create worktrees or set up a feature workspace after services are confirmed. Negative cases are service discovery, cleanup, contract work, integration tests, or single-service tasks.

positive_cases.prompt: Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234 — the services are confirmed: order-service, loyalty-service, notification-service.
Create the workspace for PROJ-5678. Services confirmed: payment-service, notification-service.
Services are confirmed for PROJ-1234. Prepare for parallel development.
Make worktrees for these services: order-service, loyalty-service, notification-service.
feature-state.json shows phase: workspace_setup and services_confirmed: true for PROJ-9000. Proceed.
I've confirmed the service list for PROJ-3001. Now set up the development workspace.

negative_cases.prompt: Which services do I need to change for PROJ-1234?
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Service discovery question — use service-discovery skill, not workspace setup.

negative_cases.prompt: What worktrees do I currently have for PROJ-1234?
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Read-only status query; no worktree creation needed.

negative_cases.prompt: Design the API contracts between order-service and loyalty-service for PROJ-1234.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Contract design task — use contract-first-design skill.

negative_cases.prompt: Clean up the PROJ-1234 feature — remove the worktrees and branches.
Run the multi-service integration tests for PROJ-1234.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Integration test task — use multi-service-integration-test skill.

negative_cases.prompt: Start a new feature: PROJ-2000 adds promo code support at checkout.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Fresh feature kickoff — use springboot-feature-bootstrap; services not confirmed yet.

negative_cases.prompt: Write a unit test for OrderService.calculateDiscount.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Single-service TDD task — use test-driven-development skill.
